caption:
3 Web Worker patterns that unblock your main thread.

Heavy computation freezes your UI. Web Workers run JavaScript in a background thread. No jank. No frozen tabs.

All browsers. No library needed.

📌 SAVE this — your users will notice the difference.

Are you using Web Workers? 👇

#webworkers #javascript #webdev #coding #programming #developer #performance #frontend #threads #codingtips

slides.title: Web Worker patterns that unblock your main thread
slides.subtitle: Heavy computation without freezing the UI.

slides.title: Dedicated Worker — offload heavy tasks
slides.desc: Spawn a background thread. Send data in, get results back. UI stays smooth.

slides.title: Shared Worker — one worker, many tabs
slides.desc: Multiple browser tabs share one worker. Coordinate state between them.
slides.punchline: Cart syncs across tabs. No localStorage polling.

slides.title: Transferable Objects — zero-copy data transfer
slides.desc: Move ArrayBuffers to workers instantly. No serialization overhead.

slides.title: Web Workers Cheat Sheet

items.label: Dedicated
items.desc: new Worker() — one thread per worker

slides.question: What do you offload to workers? 👇
